<style>
.notice-box {
    background-color: white;
    color: black;
    padding: 7px;
    border: 2px solid black;
    font-size: 10px;
    text-align: left;
    width: auto;
}
</style>

<script>
        window.onload = function() {
            var noticeBox = document.createElement('div');
            noticeBox.className = 'notice-box';
            noticeBox.textContent = 'Additional $5 added to all non-cash transactions';

            var hourlyRateText = document.querySelector('.additional-price-info div');
            hourlyRateText.parentNode.insertBefore(noticeBox, hourlyRateText);
        };
    </script>

<script>
window.onload = function() {
  // Select all dropdown elements
  var dropdowns = document.querySelectorAll('select');

  // Function to handle redirection
  function handleRedirect(dropdown) {
    dropdown.addEventListener('change', function() {
      switch (this.value) {
        case "Tattoos":
          window.location.href = "https://sideshowproductionstattoo.com/collections/promotions/products/national-mental-health-awareness-tattoo";
          break;
        case "Piercings":
          window.location.href = "https://sideshowproductionstattoo.com/collections/promotions/products/national-mental-health-awareness-piercings";
          break;
        case "Tooth Gems":
          window.location.href = "https://sideshowproductionstattoo.com/collections/promotions/products/national-mental-health-awareness-toothgems?";
          break;
        case "Teeth Whitening":
          window.location.href = "https://sideshowproductionstattoo.com/collections/promotions/products/national-mental-health-awareness-month-teeth-whitening-promotions";
          break;
      }
    });
  }

  // Check each dropdown to see if it's the one we want to handle
  dropdowns.forEach(function(dropdown) {
    var label = dropdown.previousElementSibling; // Gets the label just before the dropdown
    if (label && label.innerText.includes("What Would You Like To Get Done?")) {
      handleRedirect(dropdown); // Attach event listener if it's the right dropdown
    }
  });
}

</script>

settings.title: FAQ
settings.dbtfy_faq_banner_subtitle: Our customer service will be happy to help you.

settings.text: Keep your new tattoo vibrant and healthy! Follow our step-by-step guide for the best healing results
Discover how to care for your new piercing with our expert advice. Ensure quick healing and avoid complications.
Know what to expect at Sideshow Productions. Familiarize yourself with our studio policies for a smooth experience

settings.quote: "Great Service for a great price. Was very happy today. No complaints, Will recommend them to anyone. Very nice people."
settings.author: Sandy Howard

settings.quote: "Friendly staff and reasonable prices. I'm happy to have brought my vehicle here for the servicing of my tires."
settings.author: judy wolf

settings.quote: "Had a tattoo with Jake and it was the BEST tattoo experience I have ever had. Most painless tattoo EVER. Like literally almost fell asleep (in a good way lol). They're healing super well. Was given a second piece of second skin to apply later if it pealed and was wrapped up super well before leaving. Clean shop. And felt comfortable from the start of my appt."
settings.author: Hayley Ainsworth

settings.quote: "I love this shop! I've had both tattoos and piercings done here, and they always turn out amazing 👏 They have a clean, friendly, and welcoming atmosphere. The staff are all very knowledgeable, professional, and kind. They are also very affordable! Jake and James are my favorite, but I'd recommend any of the artists/piercers there!"
settings.author: Dakota Fuller

settings.quote: "I absolutely loveeeeee this tattoo shop!! I have gotten my last 3 tattoos from them and my dad has gotten one as well and all the time I have been everyone has been super nice and the environment is very welcoming! Every artist there does amazing work and they are very accommodating. Highly recommend this shop for your next tattoo!"
settings.author: Ashleigh Jensen

settings.quote: "He pierced my nose for me! Was super nice and professional! I absolutely love sideshow! They are nice every time I've come in!"
settings.author: Jae Ahlstrom

settings.quote: "I went and got a few piercings from Sonny for some promotion. All the employees were really nice and supportive, and i ended up having a conversation with several of them. I plan on coming back again."
settings.author: grey

settings.quote: "AMAZING people! So far the best experience i’ve had since i’ve been in Utah. I like the energy and people."
settings.author: Megan Yama

settings.quote: "When I first walked in Madison helped me fill out the paperwork and she was so kind! I got my tattoo done with James and he did a wonderful job he is very talented and passionate about his work! As he was working on it I was chatting with Madison and she is such an awesome and talented woman! The vibes all around were really nice and everyone is reasonably priced! I would recommend to see James or Madison for your next tattoo!"
settings.author: Jana Sorenson

settings.quote: "Love this place. My daughter and I have gotten a few flash tattoos and have never been disappointed"
settings.author: Helen Barbosa

settings.quote: "James was absolutely amazing, quick and clean, definitely coming back for a full session from him."
settings.author: Robert Kiepe

settings.quote: "This place is great! I got a tattoo from artist James savage. He did a great job and was really awesome. Check it out."
settings.author: Sam Rayzman

settings.quote: "I absolutely adore this tattoo shop! It's clean and friendly! Everyone is super kind and amazing but super special shout out to Maddie! She is the artist who did this lovely piece! Super great experience!"
settings.author: Alexia Henrie

settings.quote: Love sideshow productions its like a home away from home and everyone is so friendly and helpful would recommend this place to any and everybody!!

settings.quote: Came for an event today for a great cause and got my teeth whitened and a lovely heart tattoo! The whole staff was so kind and welcoming! Please consider them for all your piercing, teeth whitening, teeth gem and tattoo needs ❤️

settings.quote: I love Sideshow Productions! They have the best flash events and great custom work. They're super friendly and the environment is very comfortable. I love that they have snacks and drinks for sale (it's never good to get tattooed on an empty tummy).

settings.quote: Coming in, it was very welcoming. I’ve gotten a couple tattoos here before and I love this place. My artist was Jake and he had amazing lines. The tattoo looked exactly like the handwriting I wanted it in.

settings.title: Hide Quanitiy Div
settings.code:
<script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
    // Function to check and hide the product quantity div
    function checkAndHideProductQuantity() {
        var meetyBlockButtons = document.querySelector('.meety-block-buttons');
        var productQuantityDiv = document.querySelector('.product-single__quantity');

        if (meetyBlockButtons && productQuantityDiv) {
            productQuantityDiv.style.display = 'none';
        }
    }

    // Create a new MutationObserver instance
    var observer = new MutationObserver(function(mutations) {
        mutations.forEach(function(mutation) {
            if (mutation.addedNodes.length) {
                checkAndHideProductQuantity();
            }
        });
    });

    // Options for the observer (which parts of the DOM to monitor)
    var config = { childList: true, subtree: true };

    // Start observing the body for added nodes
    observer.observe(document.body, config);
});



</script>

settings.title: Replace Images in Calendar
settings.code:
<script>
// Function to replace the image src for specific images
function replaceImageSrc() {
    // Define an array of objects containing the old and new src values
    var imagesToReplace = [
        {
            oldSrc: "https://cdn.shopify.com/extensions/8448df73-2547-42bc-8902-b3e38d788294/meety-160/assets/Clock.svg",
            newSrc: "https://cdn.shopify.com/s/files/1/0684/2997/1713/files/Clock_1.svg?v=1706503463"
        },
        {
            oldSrc: "https://cdn.shopify.com/extensions/8448df73-2547-42bc-8902-b3e38d788294/meety-160/assets/Calendar-highlight.svg",
            newSrc: "https://cdn.shopify.com/s/files/1/0684/2997/1713/files/Calendar-highlight_1.svg?v=1706503463"
        },
        {
            oldSrc: "https://cdn.shopify.com/extensions/8448df73-2547-42bc-8902-b3e38d788294/meety-160/assets/Info-circle.svg",
            newSrc: "https://cdn.shopify.com/s/files/1/0684/2997/1713/files/Info-circle_1.svg?v=1706503463"
        }
    ];

    // Iterate over each image object and replace the src if the image is found
    imagesToReplace.forEach(function(image) {
        var imageElement = document.querySelector(`img[src="${image.oldSrc}"]`);
        if (imageElement) {
            imageElement.src = image.newSrc;
        }
    });
}

// Create a MutationObserver to monitor the DOM for changes
var observer = new MutationObserver(function(mutations) {
    mutations.forEach(function(mutation) {
        if (mutation.addedNodes.length) {
            replaceImageSrc();
        }
    });
});

// Start observing the document body for added nodes
observer.observe(document.body, { childList: true, subtree: true });

// Also call replaceImageSrc on DOMContentLoaded in case the images are already in the initial HTML
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', replaceImageSrc);
</script>

settings.title: Replace image
settings.code:
<script>
// Function to replace the image
function replaceImage() {
    var newImageSrc = "https://cdn.shopify.com/s/files/1/0758/0483/6140/files/Calendar-higzxcxczxchlight_1_1.png?v=1707526595";
    var targetImageSelector = '.meety-info-confirm-container .meety-text-with-icon.meety-blue-text img';

    // Try to find the target image
    var targetImage = document.querySelector(targetImageSelector);

    // If the target image is found, replace its src attribute
    if (targetImage) {
        targetImage.src = newImageSrc;
        console.log('Image replaced successfully');
    }
}

// Create an observer instance linked to a callback function
// to execute whenever mutations are observed
var observer = new MutationObserver(function(mutations) {
    mutations.forEach(function(mutation) {
        if (!mutation.addedNodes) return;

        for (var i = 0; i < mutation.addedNodes.length; i++) {
            // Check each added node to see if the target image is among them or within them
            var node = mutation.addedNodes[i];
            var targetImageExists = node.querySelector && node.querySelector('.meety-info-confirm-container .meety-text-with-icon.meety-blue-text img');
            if (targetImageExists) {
                replaceImage();
                // Optional: disconnect observer if you only need to replace the image once
                observer.disconnect();
            }
        }
    });
});

// Configuration of the observer:
var config = { childList: true, subtree: true };

// Select the target node on which to observe DOM mutations
var targetNode = document.body; // You might want to choose a more specific container if possible

// Start observing the target node for configured mutations
observer.observe(targetNode, config);

// Additionally, you might want to run replaceImage initially in case the image is already in the DOM
replaceImage();

function addWhiteOutlineToDiv() {
    var div = document.querySelector('.meety-block-buttons');
    if (div) {
        div.style.border = '2px solid white'; // Adjust the border thickness and style as needed
    }
}

// MutationObserver to watch for changes in the DOM
var observer = new MutationObserver(function(mutations) {
    mutations.forEach(function(mutation) {
        mutation.addedNodes.forEach(function(node) {
            if (node.nodeType === 1 && node.matches('.meety-block-buttons')) {
                addWhiteOutlineToDiv();
            }
        });
    });
});

// Start observing the document body for added nodes
observer.observe(document.body, {
    childList: true,
    subtree: true
});

// Initial check in case the div is already in the DOM
addWhiteOutlineToDiv();
</script>

settings.title: Redirect to Instagram Tittle
settings.code:
<script>
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function() {
    var targetNode = document.body; // Adjust if the exact parent is known

    var config = { childList: true, subtree: true };

    var callback = function(mutationsList, observer) {
        for (var mutation of mutationsList) {
            if (mutation.type === 'childList') {
                mutation.addedNodes.forEach(node => {
                    // Check if the added node contains our target button
                    if (node.nodeType === 1 && node.querySelector('.meety-block-button.meety-block-schedule-button')) {
                        var button = node.querySelector('.meety-block-button.meety-block-schedule-button');

                        // Check if the product title does NOT contain "*promotions*" or "*-downpayment*"
                        var productTitle = document.querySelector('.product-single__title');
                        if (productTitle && !productTitle.textContent.includes('*promotions*') && !productTitle.textContent.includes('*-downpayment*')) {

                            // Create a hidden <a> link
                            var hiddenLink = document.createElement('a');
                            hiddenLink.href = "https://www.instagram.com/sideshowproductionstattoo/";
                            hiddenLink.style.display = "none"; // Hide the link
                            hiddenLink.setAttribute('id', 'hiddenLink'); // Set an ID for easy access
                            
                            // Append the hidden link to the body or any other container
                            document.body.appendChild(hiddenLink);

                            // Add click event listener to the button
                            button.addEventListener('click', function() {
                                // Programmatically click the hidden link
                                var hiddenLink = document.getElementById('hiddenLink');
                                if (hiddenLink) {
                                    hiddenLink.click();
                                    // Delayed action to remove overlay and overflow hidden
                                    setTimeout(function() {
                                        var overlay = document.querySelector('[data-testid="overlay"]');
                                        if (overlay) {
                                            overlay.remove();
                                            document.body.style.overflow = "visible";
                                        }
                                    }, 500); // 0.5 second delay (500 milliseconds)
                                }
                            });

                            // Since the button and hidden link setup is done, disconnect the observer
                            observer.disconnect();
                        }
                    }
                });
            }
        }
    };

    var observer = new MutationObserver(callback);
    observer.observe(targetNode, config);
});
</script>

settings.title: Piercings Menu
settings.code:
<script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
    var originalSelect = document.getElementById('SingleOptionSelector-0');
    var hasPiercings = Array.from(originalSelect.options).some(option => 
        option.value.includes('(Ear)') || 
        option.value.includes('(Facial)') || 
        option.value.includes('(Oral)') || 
        option.value.includes('(Body)') || 
        option.value.includes('(Vulvar)') || 
        option.value.includes('(Penile)')
    );

    // If piercings are detected in the options, run the script
    if (hasPiercings) {
        originalSelect.style.display = 'none'; // Hide the original list

        // Create and insert the type selector
        var typeSelect = document.createElement('select');
        typeSelect.id = 'type-select';
        typeSelect.className = 'select--small';
        typeSelect.innerHTML = `
            <option value="all">All</option>
            <option value="ear">Ear</option>
            <option value="facial">Facial</option>
            <option value="oral">Oral</option>
            <option value="body">Body</option>
            <option value="vulvar">Vulvar</option>
            <option value="penile">Penile</option>
        `;
        originalSelect.parentNode.insertBefore(typeSelect, originalSelect);

        // Apply margin to the type selector for spacing
        typeSelect.style.marginBottom = '5px'; // Add 5px space below the type selector

        // Create and insert the options selector
        var optionsSelect = document.createElement('select');
        optionsSelect.id = 'options-select';
        optionsSelect.className = 'select--small';
        originalSelect.parentNode.insertBefore(optionsSelect, originalSelect.nextSibling);

        // Function to remove the type in parentheses from the option text
        function formatOptionText(optionText, type) {
            if (type !== 'all') {
                return optionText.replace(/\s\(.+?\)/, '');
            }
            return optionText;
        }

        // Populate options based on type
        function populateOptions(type) {
            var optionsToShow = Array.from(originalSelect.options);
            optionsSelect.innerHTML = ''; // Clear current options
            
            optionsToShow.forEach(function(option) {
                if (type === 'all' || option.value.toLowerCase().includes(`(${type.toLowerCase()})`)) {
                    var displayText = formatOptionText(option.text, type);
                    optionsSelect.options.add(new Option(displayText, option.value));
                }
            });

            optionsSelect.style.display = 'block'; // Show the options selector
        }

        // Update original select when the options select changes
        optionsSelect.addEventListener('change', function() {
            originalSelect.value = this.value;
            // Trigger the change event on the original select to update the UI
            var event = new Event('change', { bubbles: true });
            originalSelect.dispatchEvent(event);
        });

        // Event listener for the type selector
        typeSelect.addEventListener('change', function(event) {
            populateOptions(event.target.value);
        });

        // Initially populate the options dropdown with 'all' types selected
        populateOptions('all');
    }
});
</script>

<script>
function changeButtonBackgroundColor() {
  const buttons = document.querySelectorAll('.meety-block-schedule-button');
  if (buttons.length > 0) {
    buttons.forEach(button => {
      button.style.setProperty('background-color', '#310000', 'important');
    });
    // Clear the interval after applying the style
    clearInterval(intervalId);
  }
}

// Check every 500 milliseconds
const intervalId = setInterval(changeButtonBackgroundColor, 500);

</script>

            }
        }
    }

    // Wait for a short delay before executing the update to ensure the page is ready
    setTimeout(delayedUpdate, 500); // Delay of 500 milliseconds
});

settings.title: REDIREFTCS
settings.code:
<script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
    // Map the options to their corresponding URLs
    const serviceUrls = {
        "Tattoo": "https://sideshowproductionstattoo.com/products/tattoo-monthly-promotions",
        "Piercing": "https://sideshowproductionstattoo.com/collections/tattoo-services/products/celebrate-national-pet-day-event-piercings-promotions",
        "Tooth Gems": "https://sideshowproductionstattoo.com/collections/tattoo-services/products/celebrate-national-pet-day-event-tooth-gems-promotions"
    };

    // Find the dropdowns
    const serviceDropdown = document.getElementById('SingleOptionSelector-0');
    const attendeeDropdown = document.getElementById('SingleOptionSelector-1');

    // Listen for changes on the service dropdown
    if (serviceDropdown && attendeeDropdown) {
        serviceDropdown.addEventListener('change', function() {
            // Get the selected service and number of attendees
            const selectedService = serviceDropdown.value;
            const selectedAttendees = attendeeDropdown.value;

            // Construct the URL with attendees as a query parameter
            const url = `${serviceUrls[selectedService]}?attendees=${selectedAttendees}`;

            // Redirect to the URL
            if (url) {
                window.location.href = url;
            }
        });
    }
});


</script>
